fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identifier for the certificate.

fields.name: Scope
fields.tooltip: Specifies the availability of the certificate. Company gives all users in this specific company access to the certificate. User gives access to a specific user in any company. Company and User gives access to a specific user in the specific company.

fields.name: Expiry Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the certificate will expire.

fields.name: Has Private Key
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the certificate has a private key.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the certificate.

fields.name: Issued By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the certificate authority that issued the certificate.

fields.name: Issued To
fields.tooltip: Specifies the person, organization, or domain that the certificate was issued to.
